history.text: Sukhothai Kingdom ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.

The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Thailand.

worthSeeing.title: Bangkok:
worthSeeing.text: Sprawling royal capital of glittering temples, canals, street food, and frenetic energy.

worthSeeing.title: Chiang Mai:
worthSeeing.text: Northern rose city of traditional Lanna culture, elephant sanctuaries, and night bazaars.

worthSeeing.title: Phi Phi Islands:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic limestone cliffs, turquoise bays, and world-famous beach parties.
